item.title: my Darth Vader cosplay~ (to celebrate Star Wars Day!)
item.description: I tried to think of a cool way to celebrate one of my favorite franchises EVER and I figured the best way to do it was by combining it with something I love just as much: cosplay! :D

item.description: Built this entire cosplay from scratch, still the most badass I've ever felt in a cosplay :D May the 4th be with you today!

item.title: Images of Note: poot
item.description:
I had a dream that my mother surreptitiously attached a bar of Lithium to someone's van to track them.
Mood
Now I want robes.
Imagine seeing that. Imagine walking along a path and seeing somecunt punching some stone until a bit falls off.
Yes
Which character(s) do that?
It's because school shootings make elected officials money and thus there's less of a desire to actually stop them.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
The Perils of Penelope Pitstop was a weird fucking show. They had this girl's guardian try to kill someone for their fortune while the fucking Mob tried to thwart the guardian. THE MOB.
Run.
Yeah don't do this
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
Yeah my Dad has some wild lore.
Our house in the middle of our
Basically me.
Go get the Braincell!
I have a panda head I could do that with.
Waah
SOUND ON I IMPLORE YOU
This is what dreams are like.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay also STREEEEAM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.dc:creator: TheReturnOfMadJuan

item.title: Not the best way to start a weekend
item.description: Don't post here much, but you all keep me sane. Found out today that our firm lost a project that we've been prepping for 4 months. We thought we had it, and due to some semi-slimy back room stuff, we were told we didn't get it. As a recent 50% owner in a 40 year old business, whose partner is close to retirement, I thought this 4 year project would keep us sustained during the transition to my 100% ownership while I continue my journey of "WTF am I doing?". We should be fine, but it's going to take a considerable amount of work on my and my partner's part to make up what we thought was going to be some steady work for the next several years. And it's mildly terrifying as I transition into a position where I'm responsible for 10 employees, their families, and their livelihoods, as well as my family's. Thanks to all of you beautiful people for sustaining my sanity. EDIT: My first ever most viral! You people rock! And by "you people", I mean "you people". Thanks for all the kind words below. After a long night with much whiskey, things still sting this morning. But onward and upward, I suppose.
item.dc:creator: ObeeJuanKenobi

item.title: 4 May / For May
item.description: Meanwhile in the rest of the world where day of month comes before month, and today is 4 May (or 4th of May), the obvious question is if this is for May or is this for someone else, and we all know the answer.
